title: lasthenia kunthii
intro: Lasthenia kunthii, also known as Purple Tasselflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lasthenia kunthii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
